name: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.)
eligibility: 10+2 with minimum 50% aggregate from a recognized board.
description: The B.A. programme provides a robust foundation in humanities and social sciences. We emphasize the development of analytical rigor, creative expression, and a deep understanding of human culture.

hero.description: A versatile 3-year degree for future thinkers, writers, and leaders in a complex global society.

overview.subtitle: A journey through the human experience.
paragraphs: Our B.A. programme is meticulously designed to offer students a broad perspective...
With specializations in English, Political Science, and History, we prepare students.

gridCards.label: Research Excellence
gridCards.sub: Collaborative research opportunities from year 1.

gridCards.label: Global Perspective
gridCards.sub: International field experiences and guest lecturers.

gridCards.label: Industry Relevant
gridCards.sub: Curriculum designed with inputs from leading NGOs and Agencies.

gridCards.label: Leadership Programs
gridCards.sub: Specialized workshops for soft skills and career growth.

scope.subtitle: Endless possibilities in the social sector.
scope.body: Graduates find success in diverse fields such as Civil Services, Journalism, Content Strategy, Education, and International NGOs.

curriculum.subtitle: A carefully curated map of learning.
curriculum.introNote: Core subjects are balanced with diverse electives.
curriculum.outroNote: Final year focuses on research synthesis.

accordionSections.title: Semester 1
accordionSections.content: Intro to Literature, World History, Basics of Political Theory, Communication Labs.

accordionSections.title: Semester 2
accordionSections.content: Modern Indian History, Western Political Philosophy, English Poetry.

accordionSections.title: Semester 3
accordionSections.content: Public Administration, Advanced Literature, Research Methods.

accordionSections.title: Semester 5
accordionSections.content: Constitution Law, International Relations, Creative Writing.

accordionSections.title: Semester 6
accordionSections.content: Final Research Paper, Internships, Major Project.

roadmap.subtitle: Your path from student to social leader.

years.contentDesc: Year one focusing on core thinking skills.
Final year projects and civil service prep.

items.q: What is the eligibility for the B.A. programme?
